en_title: Steam Machine Companion Cube Canceled Because Dbrand Didn't Ask Valve for Permission
subtitle: 先斩后奏，一场空
opus_summary: 因未获Valve许可，dbrand推出的Steam Machine《传送门》Companion Cube外壳预购量飙升后被迫下架，公司启动退款并承认未先授权。

paragraphs.en: Tech accessory company dbrand has canceled its Steam Machine Companion Cube enclosure effective immediately because it didn't ask Valve for permission to make it in the first place.
paragraphs.cn: 科技外设公司dbrand已即日起取消Steam Machine的Companion Cube外壳，原因是该公司从一开始就未征得Valve许可。

paragraphs.en: The company offered fans of the massively popular cosmetic a lengthy explanation – and an apology – with a post on its subreddit . Refunds are already in the works as of today, with buyers encouraged to reach out if they haven't received one by the end of the week.
paragraphs.cn: 该公司在其subreddit上发布长篇解释与致歉。退款今天已开始处理，若买家本周结束前仍未收到退款，建议主动联系。

paragraphs.en: Unfortunately, dbrand's account of the Companion Cube kerfuffle is painfully simple: "We built the idea into something real without ever asking Valve if we could."
paragraphs.cn: 遗憾的是，dbrand对这场Companion Cube风波的叙述直白得令人心痛：「我们把这个想法变成了实物，却从未问过Valve是否允许。」

paragraphs.en: "We’re going to regret that decision for a very long time," it added.
paragraphs.cn: 「我们将会为这个决定后悔很久。」

paragraphs.en: The accessory company recounts the events of November 12, 2025, the day Valve announced its PC-and-console hybrid, the Steam Machine. Interested gamers and, more specifically, fans of Portal, the game the accessory pulled its iconic model from, will remember seeing a concept render and sign-up page for the Companion Cube enclosure. As it turns out, despite going "moderately viral," Valve never gave dbrand the OK to do this in the first place.
paragraphs.cn: 这家外设公司回顾了2025年11月12日的事件——那天Valve公布了其PC与主机混合设备Steam Machine。感兴趣的玩家，尤其是《传送门》粉丝，应该还记得看到过这款外壳的概念渲染图和注册页面，该配件正是从《传送门》汲取了标志性模型。结果，尽管此事一度「小火一把」，Valve自始至终从未允许dbrand这么做。

paragraphs.en: Dbrand says it "poured our souls" into the Steam Machine Companion Cube, spending "thousands of hours" ironing out the kinks in hopes of delivering a product that looked like it had been ripped right out of Aperture Science. It was redesigned from scratch "more than once" to make sure it cradled the Valve device perfectly.
paragraphs.cn: dbrand表示，他们为Steam Machine的Companion Cube「倾注了灵魂」，耗费「数千小时」打磨细节，期望成品看起来就像直接从光圈科技实验室里拿出来的。他们还「不止一次」从零重新设计，确保外壳能完美贴合Valve的设备。

paragraphs.en: Dbrand even added that it was set up to lose money on every $99 Poverty Cube alternative it sold. However, for the team putting their everything into the Portal love letter, "it didn't matter" because "this had turned into a passion project for the entire organization."
paragraphs.cn: dbrand甚至补充说，每售出一个99美元(约合人民币673元)的「贫穷立方体」替代品，他们都要亏钱。然而，对于全身心投入这封《传送门》情书的团队来说，「这并不重要」，因为「这已演变为整个公司的热爱项目」。

paragraphs.en: "Unfortunately, being proud of the thing we made did not give us the right to make it," dbrand said.
paragraphs.cn: 「遗憾的是，我们为自己的作品感到自豪，但这并不赋予我们制造它的权利。」dbrand表示。

paragraphs.en: The Steam Machine Companion Cube became the company's second-fastest-selling product when orders opened last week . Then, Valve reached out.
paragraphs.cn: 上周开启预购时，Steam Machine的Companion Cube即成为该公司有史以来第二畅销的产品。随后，Valve找上门来。

paragraphs.en: "They stated that the Companion Cube is Valve intellectual property, for which dbrand does not have a license," dbrand's message continued. "They requested we take down the product and launch film immediately. This was entirely within their rights, and they were direct, fair, and respectful throughout.
paragraphs.cn: 「他们指出Companion Cube是Valve的知识产权，dbrand并未获得许可，」dbrand的声明继续写道，「他们要求我们立即下架该产品及发布视频。这完全是他们的合法权利，而且他们全程直截了当、公平且尊重。」

paragraphs.en: "We took everything down and made an appeal. We asked Valve whether there was any way to keep the project alive: properly licensed, with their blessing, on their terms. They said no. Given our backwards approach of building first and asking permission later, it was a fair answer."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们撤下所有内容后提出申诉。我们问Valve，是否还能以任何方式让这个项目起死回生：获得正式授权、得到他们的祝福、按他们的条件来。他们拒绝了。考虑到我们先斩后奏的做法，这个回答很公平。」

paragraphs.en: Dbrand admitted that it "made something a lot of people were excited about, then incinerated our shot at bringing it to market." It then called the situation "a hard lesson to learn publicly."
paragraphs.cn: dbrand承认「我们做了一件让很多人兴奋的东西，然后亲手毁掉了将之推向市场的机会。」并称这是「一次公开的惨痛教训」。

paragraphs.en: Mentions of the Steam Machine Companion Cube have already been wiped from dbrand's website and social media feeds. It's been so thoroughly cleared that links to its previous store page now redirect straight to the Reddit post.
paragraphs.cn: dbrand的网站和社交媒体上已清除了所有Steam Machine Companion Cube的相关内容。清理之彻底，连指向其原有商店页面的链接现在都直接跳转至那篇Reddit帖子。

paragraphs.en: "It goes without saying, but we’ll say it regardless: Valve didn’t do anything wrong here," dbrand added. "They built a game franchise a lot of people love and they alone get to decide how it’s used.
paragraphs.cn: 「有些话不必多说，但我们还是要说：Valve在这件事上并无过错，」dbrand补充道，「他们创造了一个广受喜爱的游戏系列，只有他们有权决定如何使用。」

paragraphs.en: "To everyone who was as excited about this project as we were: thank you, and sorry. Refunds are being issued today. If it hasn’t landed in your account by the end of this week, you know how to reach us."
paragraphs.cn: 「致所有和我们一样对此项目感到兴奋的人：谢谢你们，也很抱歉。退款今天正在发放。如果本周末前还未到账，你们知道怎么找到我们。」

paragraphs.en: "To Valve: thank you for Portal, and sorry for the headache. We should’ve asked first."
paragraphs.cn: 「致Valve：感谢你们带来了《传送门》，也为引发的麻烦道歉。我们本该先征得许可。」

paragraphs.en: Valve opened reservations for its Steam Machine last week and was immediately faced with scalpers . For more, you can read IGN's original coverage of the Companion Cube – even if it will never see the light of day.
paragraphs.cn: Valve上周开放了Steam Machine的预订，并立即面临黄牛抢购。
